title: Biblically Accurate Ladders
description: Ladders are now actually made of sticks
body: I- I don't know why I felt the need to make this. Maybe somebody out there needs this sooo... does NOT need Optifine I might do a "series" of biblically accurate Minecraft items. If you want anything just ask on my [Curse Forge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/biblically-accurate-ladders/comments) or [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/biblically-accurate-ladders/) page. There is no guarantee that I will make it, but it doesn't hurt to ask.
